info.name: Google Workspace Calendar Sync
info.summary: Bidirectional Google Workspace ↔ Nextcloud calendar sync via domain Service Account
info.description:
Keep every user's Nextcloud calendar in perfect sync with Google Workspace — bidirectionally, automatically, with no per-user configuration.
A single Google Service Account with Domain-Wide Delegation impersonates all users in the domain. Calendar pairs are matched by display name. Conflicts are resolved by last-modified timestamp.
**Features** - Bidirectional sync (Nextcloud ↔ Google) with conflict resolution - Domain-wide: one SA covers all users automatically - All calendars per user, matched by display name - Incremental sync via Google sync tokens and Nextcloud CTags - Configurable sync direction (one or both ways) - Sync-from-date filtering to limit historical import - Google Meet links and event locations preserved - Live per-user progress in the admin panel - Cron-based automatic sync + manual "Sync Now" button
Developed by [IANUSTEC](https://ianustec.com) as part of our open-source initiative to help companies migrate from Google and Microsoft to self-hosted infrastructure.
info.author: IANUSTEC
